arguments.command: dotnet tool list -g 2>/dev/null; which reportgenerator 2>/dev/null; dotnet reportgenerator --help 2>/dev/null | head -5

data.reasoningText:
Now let me parse and summarize the coverage data. Let me analyze it:

**Overall:**
- Line rate: 58% (35/60 lines covered)
- Branch rate: 45% (9/20 branches covered)

**By method:**

| Method | Line Rate | Branch Rate | Complexity |
|--------|-----------|-------------|------------|
| Enroll | 75% | 67% | 6 |
| CalculateGpa | 25% | 20% | 10 |
| FindById | 100% | 100% | 1 |
| Search | 50% | 50% | 2 |


I should also check if there's a report generator tool available to create a more detailed coverage report.
